title: Application Documents Checklist for Chinese Universities
titleZh: 中国高校申请材料清单
summary: A complete checklist of documents you need to apply: passport, transcripts, recommendation letters, personal statement, and language certificates.
summaryZh: 申请所需材料完整清单：护照、成绩单、推荐信、个人陈述与语言证明。
content:
Most Chinese universities ask for similar sets of documents. Prepare them early to avoid last-minute stress.

Required

Passport copy, highest diploma and transcripts (notarized if required), recommendation letters (usually 2), personal statement or study plan, physical examination form, and HSK or English proficiency proof.

Tips

Keep digital and physical copies. Some schools require documents to be sent by post or through their online portal.
contentZh:
多数中国高校要求的材料类似。提前准备可避免临期慌乱。

必备材料

护照复印件、最高学历与成绩单（如需公证则公证）、推荐信（通常 2 封）、个人陈述或学习计划、体检表、HSK 或英语能力证明。

建议

保留电子版与纸质版。部分学校要求邮寄或通过其系统上传。
author: Editorial Team

title: Online Application: Step-by-Step Guide
summary: How to complete the online application: creating an account, filling the form, uploading documents, and paying fees.
summaryZh: 如何完成网申：注册、填表、上传材料与缴费。
content:
Many universities use the CUCAS or their own portal. This guide walks you through each step.

Step 1

Register and verify your email. Prepare a clear photo and scanned documents in PDF.

Step 2

Fill in personal and academic information. Double-check names and dates.

Step 3

Upload documents according to the size and format required. Pay the application fee if applicable.
contentZh:
许多高校使用 CUCAS 或本校系统。本指南逐步说明。

第一步

注册并验证邮箱。准备清晰照片与 PDF 扫描件。

第二步

填写个人与学业信息。核对姓名与日期。

第三步

按格式与大小要求上传材料。如需则缴纳申请费。
author: Editorial Team

title: Student Visa (X1/X2): Requirements and Process
titleZh: 学生签证（X1/X2）：要求与办理流程
summary: What you need for a Chinese student visa: JW201/JW202, admission letter, and where to apply.
summaryZh: 办理中国学生签证所需：JW201/JW202、录取通知书及申请地点。
content:
After admission, you will receive an admission letter and a JW201 or JW202 form. Use these to apply for an X1 (long-term) or X2 (short-term) visa at the Chinese embassy or consulate.

Documents

Passport, visa application form, photo, admission notice, JW201/JW202, and physical examination record.

Processing Time

Usually 4–5 business days. Plan ahead for peak seasons.
contentZh:
录取后会收到录取通知书和 JW201 或 JW202 表。凭此在中国使领馆申请 X1（长期）或 X2（短期）学生签证。

材料

护照、签证申请表、照片、录取通知、JW201/JW202、体检记录。

办理时间

通常 4–5 个工作日。旺季请提前规划。
author: Editorial Team
